VJs TV is the global broadcast network for VJ culture, audiovisual performances, and digital visual art. Watch live performances, discover artists, and explore the world of visual performance.

Contact Info
Global Network
VJs TV HQ

Follow Us

The Arsenal of Visual Performance

Technology

Visual software, projection systems, media servers, LED technologies, and AI tools powering VJ culture worldwide. Each tool links directly to the artists using it.

Category:
AE
3D & Motion Design
Adobe After Effects

Industry-standard motion graphics and visual effects software. VJs use After Effects to create animated loops, effects, and visual content for live performance.

Universal tool across all creative industries. Used by virtually every professional VJ creating pre-rendered visual content.
Used by: Motion designersVJ content creators
AK
Controllers
Akai APC40

Professional MIDI controller built for Ableton Live but widely adopted by VJs. Its clip launch grid and fader bank map perfectly to visual performance workflows.

Industry standard MIDI controller with crossover between music production and VJ communities globally.
Used by: VJsLive performers
AK
VJ Software
ArKaos GrandVJ

Professional VJ software and media server for live events. Layer-based mixing, effects, DMX control, and pixel mapping for clubs, touring, and broadcast.

Established brand with global VJ community presence. Used in venues, touring shows, and broadcast productions.
Used by: Club VJsTouring visual artists
BM
Hardware
Blackmagic Design

Professional video hardware manufacturer. DeckLink capture cards, ATEM switchers, and HyperDeck recorders are standard in VJ and live production setups.

Hardware staple of professional AV setups globally. Strong brand recognition across VJs, live event crews, and broadcast.
Used by: Professional VJsLive event crews
BL
3D & Motion Design
Blender

Free, open-source 3D creation suite. VJs and motion designers use Blender for modelling, animation, rendering, and creating visual content for live performance.

Massive global community. Dominant free tool in visual arts education and independent VJ content creation.
Used by: Motion designersIndependent VJs
C4
3D & Motion Design
Cinema 4D

Professional 3D motion design software. The industry standard for motion graphics and visual content creation used in broadcast, film, and live event visuals.

The standard in broadcast motion graphics. Deep reach into professional motion designers creating VJ content.
Used by: Motion designersBroadcast visual artists
DG
Media Server
Disguise

Industry-leading media server and virtual production platform used in world tours, broadcast, and XR stages. Trusted by the biggest names in live entertainment.

The gold standard for world touring productions. Direct access to top-tier touring visual designers and production companies.
Used by: World touring productionsBroadcast studios
HM
Projection Mapping
HeavyM

User-friendly yet pro-level projection mapping software with built-in effects library. Ideal for beginners and pros mapping onto stages, facades, and objects.

Growing rapidly among event designers and club VJs. Strong appeal to entry-level and mid-tier visual artists.
Used by: Event designersClub VJs
HP
Media Server
Hippotizer

Tour-grade media server delivering rock-solid 4K/8K playback, pixel mapping, and real-time effects. The industry standard for live event and concert visual playback.

Widely used on major touring productions. Premium brand recognition among professional visual designers.
Used by: Concert touring crewsFestival visual designers
KR
AI Visual Tools
KREA AI

Real-time AI generative canvas used by VJs to create unique looping visual content. Generates imagery from prompts in real time — perfect for building custom VJ loop libraries.

Cutting-edge AI tool gaining fast traction in the VJ and creative AI community. Unique real-time generation capability.
Used by: AI VJsGenerative artists
MM
Projection Mapping
MadMapper

Advanced projection mapping and LED mapping software for creating spatial augmented reality experiences and architectural projections.

Dominant in large-scale architectural projection mapping — direct brand exposure at festival-scale events in 30+ countries.
Used by: Luna VisualsFlux Collective
MV
VJ Software
Magic Music Visuals

Generative and audio-reactive VJ software with a visual patching system. Creates stunning real-time visuals that respond to music — ideal for live performance.

Popular among bedroom VJs and independent visual artists. Strong community of self-taught visual performers.
Used by: Independent VJsAudio-visual artists
MX
Visual Programming
Max/MSP

Visual programming language for music and multimedia. Used to build custom audio-reactive visuals, interactive installations, and real-time AV systems.

Core tool in academic and experimental AV communities. Deep reach into universities, conservatories, and art schools worldwide.
Used by: Experimental AV artistsAcademic researchers
MJ
AI Visual Tools
Midjourney

AI image generation platform producing stunning visual assets. VJs use Midjourney to create unique still frames, textures, and base images turned into video loops.

Dominant in the creative AI space. Widely adopted by VJs and visual artists for generating unique visual content.
Used by: VJsMotion designers
ML
Media Server
Millumin

Mac-based media server ideal for theater, live events, and immersive installations. Multi-output playback with real-time effects, OSC, MIDI, and timecode sync.

Popular among theater and live event designers. Strong base in Europe and performing arts venues globally.
Used by: Theater companiesLive event designers
M8
VJ Software
Modul8

Pioneering Mac-based VJ software with layer-based mixing, Quartz Composer integration, and audio-reactive visuals. A classic in the VJ software ecosystem.

Long-established brand among veteran VJs. Strong heritage in electronic music and club visual culture.
Used by: Veteran VJsElectronic music visual artists
NTH
Real-Time 3D
Notch

Real-time 3D motion graphics, VFX, and interactive content creation tool used at the world's largest live events and music performances.

The tool behind the world's most famous live spectacles — sponsors gain association with arena-scale production credibility.
Used by: Luna VisualsPixel Storm
LP
Controllers
Novation Launchpad

Iconic grid-based MIDI controller used by VJs and producers. Its RGB pad matrix maps perfectly to Resolume's clip launching and effect triggering workflow.

Iconic in electronic music culture. Huge crossover appeal between music production and VJ communities.
Used by: VJsElectronic music producers
OB
VJ Software
OBS Studio

Free and open-source streaming and recording software. Used by VJs for live streaming visual performances, scene switching, and webcam/source mixing.

Universal entry point for live streaming VJs. Massive global user base across gaming, events, and streaming platforms.
Used by: Streaming VJsOnline visual performers
PB
Media Server
Pandoras Box

Professional media server and show control platform for large-scale events, theme parks, and permanent installations. Supports 4K/8K, pixel mapping, and timeline control.

Premium market positioning in theme parks, arenas, and large-scale permanent installations worldwide.
Used by: Theme park designersArena production crews
PR
Visual Programming
Processing

Open-source programming language and IDE for visual arts and generative graphics. The entry point for coders creating custom audio-reactive visual art and installations.

Foundational tool in creative coding education. Used by artists and students worldwide as an entry to generative visual art.
Used by: Creative codersDigital artists
RES
Visual Software
Resolume Arena

Industry-leading VJ software for real-time video mixing, compositing, and effects. Used by VJs worldwide for live performances and installations.

Highest usage across featured artists — logo placement on every artist profile, project card, and live broadcast overlay.
Used by: VJ KaiNova SpectrumPixel Storm
RM
AI Visual Tools
Runway ML

Leading AI video generation platform. Text-to-video, image-to-video, and motion control — VJs export loops or stream via NDI/Syphon into their live rigs.

The frontline of AI-powered visual creation. Exponential growth in the VJ and AV artist community in 2025–2026.
Used by: Next-gen VJsAI visual artists
SM
Media Server
Smode

High-end real-time compositing and projection mapping media server used in large-scale touring productions, concerts, and architectural installations.

Used in some of the world's largest touring productions and permanent installations. Premium tier exposure.
Used by: Concert touring crewsArchitectural mapping artists
AI
AI & Generative
AI Visual Generation

AI-powered visual generation tools (Stable Diffusion, ComfyUI, Deforum) enabling a new wave of generative VJ performances that create visuals from text and audio in real-time.

The hottest emerging category — brands sponsoring AI visual tools gain first-mover positioning in the fastest-growing sector of live visual art.
Used by: VJ KaiAurora Fractals
TD
Visual Software
TouchDesigner

A node-based visual programming environment for real-time interactive multimedia content. The industry standard for generative visual art and interactive installations.

Platform of choice for AI visual artists — featured in generative art projects reaching the most technically engaged audience.
Used by: VJ KaiNova SpectrumAurora Fractals
UE
Real-Time 3D
Unreal Engine

Industry-leading real-time 3D engine used for XR concerts, LED virtual stages, and immersive AV experiences. Powers the new era of virtual production.

Emerging as the standard for XR and LED stage productions. Massive crossover appeal from games to live events.
Used by: XR concert producersVirtual production studios
VD
VJ Software
VDMX

Lightning-fast real-time video mixing software for Mac. Modular plugin architecture, Syphon/NDI support, perfect for improvisational VJing and live performance.

Preferred tool of touring VJs. Massive brand reach at club nights, festivals, and immersive events worldwide.
Used by: Professional VJsClub visuals artists
VV
Visual Programming
vvvv

Hybrid visual/textual live-programming environment for real-time graphics, interaction, and media. Built for large-scale installations and generative AV art.

Strong in European AV art scene, media art installations, and digital performance. Growing global community.
Used by: Media artistsInteractive installation designers
For Technology Brands

Get Your Technology Featured

Reach the most technically engaged VJ audience on the planet. Technology partner placement drives direct software adoption and brand credibility.
